channel.title: Crash F1 Ranked Feed
channel.description: Editorially ranked F1 RSS feed for newsletter consumption

item.title: How Ferrari will work to close down Mercedes in April F1 break
item.description: Ferrari is lacking in a straight line compared to Mercedes and McLaren, says Formula 1 team principal Fred Vasseur.

item.title: Toto Wolff hails 'unpredictable' Kimi Antonelli F1 win rate
item.description: Kimi Antonelli has won two of the first three grands prix of the 2026 Formula 1 season, putting him at the top of the drivers' standings, something Mercedes team principal Toto Wolff describes as an 'unpredictable' outcome.

item.title: McLaren seeing “the strongest Oscar Piastri since he’s been in F1” after early setbacks
item.description: Andrea Stella believes Oscar Piastri is performing at his "strongest" level since joining the Formula 1 grid.

item.title: Red Bull offers Miami F1 hope to Max Verstappen, but not "miracles"
item.description: Laurent Mekies has promised Max Verstappen upgrades for the Miami Grand Prix, but quickly moved to limit expectations.

item.title: The ‘unexplained’ qualifying problems hindering Haas F1 drivers
item.description: Qualifying hasn't been the strongest aspect for Haas so far in the 2026 Formula 1 season.

item.title: Franco Colapinto explains “really strange” Ollie Bearman crash at F1 Japanese GP
item.description: Franco Colapinto explains his side of Ollie Bearman's terrifying Japanese Grand Prix crash.

item.title: F1 Japanese GP as it happened: Antonelli wins after safety car for huge Bearman crash
item.description: Live coverage of the 2026 Formula 1 Japanese Grand Prix

item.title: F1 champion Max Verstappen announces next Nurburgring outing
item.description: Max Verstappen will take part in the Nurburgring 24 Hours qualifiers this month

item.title: Mercedes chief thought Kimi Antonelli was a ‘lost child’ when they first met
item.description: Kimi Antonelli's meteoric F1 rise has reminded some at Mercedes of their advancing years.

item.title: Why George Russell isn't worried about early F1 title battle momentum shift
item.description: Andrea Kimi Antonelli has emerged as a stronger F1 title contender than expected after the first races of 2026

item.title: Max Verstappen's F1 future faces fresh doubt amid motivation fears
item.description: Jos Verstappen fears that Max might lose his motivation to compete in Formula 1 if he is confined to battling in the midfield.

item.title: Why Mercedes is wary of F1 rivals despite unbeaten start to 2026
item.description: Mercedes is not getting carried away despite making a perfect start to F1 2026.

item.title: Martin Brundle tells Max Verstappen ‘either go or stop talking’ amid F1 quit threats
item.description: Martin Brundle gives his verdict on Max Verstappen's threats that he could walk away from F1.

item.title: Ferrari to return to track as it takes advantage of unplanned F1 break with key tests
item.description: With no F1 races for over a month, Ferrari is set to carry out two tests in the April gap.

item.title: How likely is Max Verstappen quitting F1 and what are his options?
item.description: Max Verstappen is considering his future in F1 due to his dissatisfaction with the new rules. Could he really walk away at the end of the year, and what are his options?

item.title: Max Verstappen in fresh F1 retirement rumours as enjoyment complaints continue
item.description: Max Verstappen is said to be seriously weighing up his future amid his dissatisfaction with F1's new rules.

item.title: F1 drivers “at the mercy of what’s behind” as they’re “not in control” of deployment
item.description: Lando Norris says F1 drivers are not in control of how the power unit behaves now

item.title: Is one of F1’s new teams at risk of losing momentum after race cancellations?
item.description: Audi has started the 2026 season strongly, but could the Formula 1 spring break halt this charge?

item.title: Isack Hadjar fumes at F1 rookie in Japanese GP, but 'that wasn't 1% of my problems'
item.description: Isack Hadjar had a fiery outburst over team radio about Arvid Lindblad during the Japanese Grand Prix

item.title: Toto Wolff pokes fun at botched F1 Japanese GP start that left Kimi Antonelli “very mad”
item.description: Kimi Antonelli was not happy with his start at the Japanese Grand Prix.
